## Real-Time Space Economy Intelligence

Space Insider delivers real-time, structured data and insights across the global space economy through relational mapping that connects companies, missions, and market signals.

The platform serves investors, space company founders and executives, government agencies, military entities, industry analysts and consultants, and academic research organizations by transforming fragmented industry data into actionable intelligence that reveals not just what's happening, but who's involved and where momentum is building in this dynamic ecosystem.

## Track the entire Space Technology Market in a single place

 Comprehensive

Space Insights 

Explore comprehensive data on companies, investors, agencies, and research groups driving the Space Technology Market. Access regular market reports on key industry topics.

 Tailored Taxonomy 

Customize space data to suit your needs and navigate the space market with ease.

 Seamless Integration 

Access news and industry updates alongside our data for a complete space picture.

 Funding Made 

Simple 

Filter funding information by subsector and technology, empowering informed decision-making.

## Mission Statistics: Closing the Intelligence Loop

Our Mission Statistics feature delivers structured, filterable, and relational data on spacecraft missions, launch activity, and participation history spanning from the early days of orbital flight through confirmed future launches into the 2040s.

This feature connects missions to the organizations that owned, built, launched, and operated them, creating a continuous intelligence loop from launch to legacy.

*   **Historical Mission Archive** - Full visibility into decades of global spacecraft launches
*   **Future Launch Schedule** - Forward-looking dataset of confirmed missions through 2042
*   **Company Space Heritage** - Automatically generated histories of company involvement
*   **Launch Statistics** - Complete breakdowns of orbital and suborbital launch activity

[Explore our platform](https://spaceinsider.tech/#)

## Your Ultimate Guide

### Navigate the Space Technology Ecosystem

Companies

*   Dive into a comprehensive database covering 3.5k+ space technology companies (from upstream to midstream and downstream)
*   Discover key players shaping the future of space technology.
*   Gain insights into emerging trends and market dynamics.

Investors

*   3.5k+ investor who have been actively participating in space technology fundraises.
*   Access funding rounds, investor profiles, and investment trends.
*   Leverage data to attract investment or make informed investment decisions.

Funding

*   4.5k+ funding rounds you can filter by date, size and market subsegment.
*   Over 800 funding rounds you can filter by date, size, and technology focus.
*   Gain a competitive edge with timely and accurate funding data.

Universities

*   Discover 1k+ universities at the forefront of space technology education and research.
*   Explore research projects, academic papers, and collaborations.
*   Engage with academic institutions to access cutting-edge research and talent.

Government Entities

*   Access a list of hundreds of government agencies and national labs that are involved in space technology.
*   Stay informed about government initiatives, policies, and funding opportunities.
*   Collaborate with government entities to drive space technology adoption.

Mission Statistics

*   Access launch data spanning from early orbital missions through confirmed future launches into the 2040s.
*   Track performance across decades of missions with complete breakdowns by provider, vehicle, geography, and success status.
*   Analyze global launch activity with filterable data by spacecraft mass category, system integrator country, and operator country.

Launch Statistics

*   Browse historical archive of spacecraft missions filterable by 10+ criteria including year, mission segment, spacecraft status, and sector.
*   Review company space heritage automatically generated from mission participation across segments and timeframes.
*   Access forward-looking dataset of confirmed missions through 2042 for early engagement and procurement preparation.

Government Funding

*   Monitor procurement activity from North American and European government sources for contract identification.
*   Access funding opportunities across national space agencies and defense organizations for business growth.
*   Track government initiatives and policies affecting the space ecosystem for strategic positioning.

![Image 29](https://spaceinsider.tech/wp-content/uploads/2025/07/Companies-image-bord-1-scaled.jpg)

![Image 30](https://spaceinsider.tech/wp-content/uploads/2025/07/Investors-image-bord-1-scaled.jpg)

![Image 31](https://spaceinsider.tech/wp-content/uploads/2025/07/Funding-image-bord-1-scaled.jpg)

![Image 32](https://spaceinsider.tech/wp-content/uploads/2025/07/Universities-image-bord-1-scaled.jpg)

![Image 33](https://spaceinsider.tech/wp-content/uploads/2025/07/Government-Entities-image-bord-1-scaled.jpg)

![Image 34](https://spaceinsider.tech/wp-content/uploads/2025/07/Mission-Statistics-image-bord-1-scaled.jpg)

![Image 35](https://spaceinsider.tech/wp-content/uploads/2025/07/Launch-Statistics-image-bord-1-scaled.jpg)

![Image 36](https://spaceinsider.tech/wp-content/uploads/2025/07/Government-Funding-image-bord-1-scaled.jpg)

## Data Platform Features

![Image 37](https://spaceinsider.tech/wp-content/uploads/2025/07/Frame.png)

Custom Taxonomy & Graph Explorer

Every entity is classified using a proprietary taxonomy, enabling detailed segmentation by capability, geography, funding, space heritage and more. The platform’s graph explorer connects spacecraft owners, operators, manufacturers, launch providers, and funding sources which reveal ecosystem relationships that static spreadsheets and conventional intelligence platforms miss.

![Image 38](https://spaceinsider.tech/wp-content/uploads/2025/07/Frame-1.png)

Entity

 Profiles

Each company, agency, or investor has a structured profile including classifications, space heritage, funding M&A activity, patents and research papers, and relational context giving you both the facts and the strategic positioning

![Image 39](https://spaceinsider.tech/wp-content/uploads/2025/07/Frame-2.png)

Global Government Opportunity Tracking

Space Insider aggregates procurement activity from a wide range of North American and European sources, helping vendors stay on top of the space ecosystem with the latest in data and intelligence, as well as streamlining their visibility to access opportunities and potential business growth.

![Image 40](https://spaceinsider.tech/wp-content/uploads/2025/07/Frame-3.png)

Research & IP Intelligence

The platform includes access to over 26 million patents and over 9000 space-related research papers, indexed by the technology tags associated with relevant companies. This enables users to explore innovation trends, R&D focus areas, and intellectual property landscapes within the context of the broader ecosystem.

![Image 41](https://spaceinsider.tech/wp-content/uploads/2025/07/Frame-4.png)

Advanced Search Engine

Space Insider includes a proprietary search engine purpose-built for the space economy to surface real-time, market-moving signals from curated trusted sources. Users can customize a live intelligence feed around specific interest areas such as contract awards, funding activity, research, and more
